title: Crispy Caramelized Greek Skirt Steak Kebabs
description: A low-carb Greek dish featuring crispy caramelized skirt steak kebabs, perfect for a quick and delicious meal, with a bitter and gooey flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Add the skirt steak pieces to the bowl and toss to coat.
Thread the steak pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15 minutes, then increase the oven temperature to broil.
Broil for an additional 5 minutes, or until the steak is crispy and caramelized.
While the steak is cooking, heat about 1-2 inches of olive oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Once the oil is hot, add the cherry tomatoes and fry until they are blistered and slightly charred.
Remove the skewers from the oven and serve with the fried tomatoes.
